series_description:
Departmental copies of internal budgets,
invoices, or reconciliations, including any
related tracking systems.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Calendars, appointment books, or other
itinerary records that document business
activities.
comments:
CAUTION: Not for calendars of the
Chancellor or Board of Regents; see
CHA2143 and BOR2143.

series_description:
Contract sponsor or departmental
contract administrator (DCA)
documentation of managing a contract
from execution through closeout.
Includes, but is not limited to, reports and
deliverables required by the contract,
documentation of monitoring activities,
and general correspondence related to the
contract. May also include reference
copies of contracts, checklists,
amendments, purchase orders, change
orders, and contractor invoices.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 7 years
comments:
CAUTION: Does not include
building construction contracts; see
item OCP1322. Does not include
life insurance or retirement
contracts; see OEB2158. See item
CNP1003 for contracting records
maintained by Contracts and
Procurement.

series_description:
Documentation of mail returned by the
postal or other mail delivery services as
undeliverable.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year

series_title:
Databases - Master Files
and Application Data
series_description:
Relatively long-lived computer files
containing organized and consistent sets
of complete and accurate electronic
records and associated processing files.
Examples include, but are not limited to,
data tables of relational databases used by
applications or computer programs.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 0 years

series_description:
Information about an employee that is
maintained at the department level,
usually by a supervisor or HR Liaison. May
include but is not limited to checklists,
notes, or working documents related to
any personnel matter.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 6 months
comments:
CAUTION: Checklists should be
retained by the department until
six months after separation from
the department. All other records
in the file must be transferred to
the Office of Talent and Innovation
immediately upon separation from
the department.

series_description:
Any lists or directories of mailing
addresses, telephone or fax numbers, or
email addresses maintained by an agency
on its employees or on entities or persons
it serves.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 0 years
Life of Asset plus 0 years

series_description:
Records relating to the planning and
administration of a conference, forum, or
other event. May include, but is not
limited to: reports, planning meeting
minutes, promotional materials,
photographs, presentation materials,
schedules of speakers and activities,
registration and attendance lists,
participant evaluations, room reservation
lists, or catering services orders.
comments:
Does not include contracts; see
ALL2217.

series_description:
Internal and external periodic fiscal
management reports and associated
worksheets, including federal financial
reports, salary reports, HUB reports,
investment performance reports, etc.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 5 years

series_description:
Meetings of governance or advisory
boards, councils, and committees. May
include but is not limited to agendas,
minutes, and related documentation and
correspondence.
comments:
CAUTION: Does not include records
of Board of Regents committees;
see BOR1247 and BOR2117. For
routine internal staff or committee
meetings, see ALL2221.

series_description:
Charts or diagrams that show the
structure of an agency and the
relationships and relative ranks of its
departments and job positions.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 0 years
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Only charts
showing the overall arrangement
and administrative structure of the
agency require archival transfer.
Organizational charts showing only
department level detail are not
considered archival and may be
destroyed when they meet
retention.

series_description:
Plans and records relating to the process
of planning new or redefined programs,
services, or projects that are neither
included in nor directly related to other
records series in this schedule.
comments:
CAUTION: Some of these records
may be confidential. For event
planning, see ALL2214. For routine
departmental planning, see
ALL2221.

series_description:
Policies, procedures, or guidelines
providing governance and direction for
routine business operations that are not
listed elsewhere on this schedule.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year

series_description:
Policies and procedures governing the U.
T. System (UTS/Systemwide Policies) and
U. T. System Administration
(HOP/Handbook of Operating Procedures).
Includes final published policies as well as
working files that demonstrate the
formulation, planning, modification, or
implementation of the policies.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years
comments:
See BOR1866 for Regents' Rules
and Regulations. ARCHIVES NOTE:
Only published policies are subject
to archival review. Working files
used in creating policies may be
destroyed when retention is met.

series_description:
News, press releases, marketing files and
collateral, or any public relations files
maintained or issued by an agency.
Includes print, electronic, audio, and
audiovisual records.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years

series_description:
A publication is defined as information in
any format that is publicly distributed by
the agency, statutorily required to be
distributed by the agency, or produced by
the authority of or at the expense of the
agency. The term generally does not
include information distributed solely to
internal staff, staff of other government
agencies, or contractors/grantees of the
agency. “Major” is defined by both the
publication's authorship and its impact on
Texas and Texans. Some examples of
major publications include handbooks,
guides, manuals, external newsletters,
research reports or studies, and statistical
compilations.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Copies of major
publications must be submitted to
the Texas State Publications
Depository Program, TSLAC, by law.
Design files, images, original
artwork, or drafts created in the
creation of a major publication are
also considered archival.
legal_citation:
Texas Government
Code, Sec. 441.101-
.106 and 13 TAC 3.1-
.16

series_description:
Information in any format that is publicly
distributed by the agency, statutorily
required to be distributed by the agency,
or produced by the authority of or at the
expense of the agency. The term generally
does not include information distributed
solely to internal staff, staff of other
government agencies, or
contractors/grantees of the agency. Some
examples of minor publications include
brochures, announcements, artwork, and
internal newsletters.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
NOTE: Development files of minor
publications (drafts, design files,
images, etc.) are transitory
information and may be destroyed
when no longer needed for
reference.

series_description:
Documentation used to provide and
improve access to records. Includes
indexes, card files, shelf lists, registers,
guides, and other finding aids.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 0 years
comments:
CAUTION: These records must
carry the same retention period
and archival codes of the records
they support.

series_description:
Departmental records management plans
(DRMPs), file plans, and similar records
that establish the procedures under which
records are managed in a department.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year

series_description:
Requests and authorizations for travel;
participation in educational programs,
workshops, or college classes; or for other
work-related activities for which the
expenses of the employee are defrayed or
reimbursed.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Annual, sub-annual, or special reports or
studies on non-fiscal aspects of an
agency's programs, services, or projects
compiled by agency personnel, by
advisory committees, or by consultants
under contract with an agency that are
not noted elsewhere in this schedule.
Includes reports distributed either
internally or to other entities.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 10 years

series_description:
Records establishing authority of an
agency employee to authorize financial,
legal, or operational transactions on
behalf of an agency. Includes Delegated
Signature Authority (DSA) memos or other
records serving this purpose, including
emails.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Notes or text of speeches, papers,
presentations, or reports delivered in
conjunction with agency work.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Only speeches,
papers, and presentations given by
or on behalf of executive staff,
board or commission members,
division directors and program
heads require archival review.

retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 20 years

series_description:
Letters or forms required by the Texas
Higher Education Coordinating Board.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 5 years
comments:
NOTE: OAA retains for reference
only; more complete records are
held by UT institutions, who are
responsible for archival transfer.

retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 1 year
After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
CAUTION: Does not include
criminal history checks; see
POL1766.

series_description:
Includes working papers and agency risk
assessment used to develop the plan.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 7 years

series_description:
Job evaluations, performance appraisals,
or other similar documents used to
evaluate the performance of an employee.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 2 years

series_description:
Audits and reviews performed by or on
behalf of the agency, including the
working papers that support the audit.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 7 years

series_description:
Working papers and final reports of
Quality Assessment reviews of outside
entities, performed by System Audit Office
staff.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 5 years
comments:
NOTE: Applies only to reviews led
by a System Audit employee. If the
System Audit employee is only
participating in the review,
workpapers may be considered
transitory information.

series_title:
Quality Assessment
Reports – System Audit
Office
series_description:
Reviews of the System Audit Office,
performed by external/independent firms.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 10 years
comments:
NOTE: Retain the previous three
reports until a new report is issued.

series_description:
Documents submitted at meetings of state
boards, commissions, committees, and
councils, including exhibit items,
documentation for agenda items, public
comment forms, etc. Includes documents
sent in advance of meetings for briefing
purposes, some of which may not be
submitted at an actual meeting.
retention_statement: Permanent

series_description:
Policies and procedures established for U.
T. System by the Board of Regents.
Includes final published rules as well as
working files and related documentation
used in creating rules.
retention_statement: Permanent

series_description:
Biennial narrative reports to the governor
and legislature as required by an agency's
enabling statutes, including annual
narrative reports if they are required by
statute. Includes working files and related
documentation used in creating final
report, but see Archives Note.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 6 years
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: The archival
requirement is met by sending the
final version of these reports to the
Texas State Publications Depository
Program, Texas State Library and
Archives Commission, per 13 TAC
3.3. Working files and related
documentation used in creating the
final report may be disposed of at
the expiration of the retention
period.

series_description:
Contracts or agreements regarding the
terms and conditions of the employment
of Chief Administrative Officers.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 7 years

series_description:
Certificates of completion, certifications,
licenses, transcripts, test scores, or similar
records documenting the training, testing,
certification, licensing, or continuing
education achievements of an employee.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 5 years

series_title:
Chancellor and
Presidential Search
Committee Records
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
CAUTION: Does not include
criminal history checks; see
POL1766.

series_title:
Meetings, Certified
Agendas or Audiovisual
Recordings of Closed
series_description:
Agendas, minutes, or audiovisual
recordings of closed meetings of state
boards, commissions, committees, and
councils.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years

series_description:
Correspondence, sent or received by the
Board of Regents or any of its members,
that pertains to the formulation, planning,
implementation, interpretation,
modification, or redefinition of the
programs, services, or projects of the
University of Texas System or its
institutions.
retention_statement: Permanent

series_description:
Audiovisual recordings of open meetings
of state boards, commissions,
committees, and councils.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 0 years and 3 months
comments:
CAUTION: These recordings must
be retained at least 90 days.

series_description:
Agendas and minutes of meetings of the
Board of Regents.
retention_statement: Permanent
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Agency retains
permanent record copy. The
archival requirement will be met by
sending a copy to the Briscoe
Center for American History at UT
Austin.

series_description:
Calendars, appointment books, or other
scheduling or itinerary records maintained
by or on behalf of the Board of Regents or
any of its members.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year

series_description:
Required by the General Appropriations
Act.
retention_statement: Permanent
comments:
Budget Office is the source of
historical information for system
and institutional inquiries.

series_description:
Includes Legislative Appropriation Request
(LAR) and any supporting documentation
created and/or used to justify and support
the request.
retention_statement: Permanent
comments:
Budget Office is the source of
information for system and
institutional inquiries. ARCHIVES
NOTE: The final version of
Legislative Appropriation Requests
must be submitted to the Texas
State Publications Depository
Program per 13 TAC 3.3(a)(3)(A).

series_description: Fiscal notes and working papers.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 6 years

series_description:
Includes documentation about budget
transfers and revisions, as well as detail
charts of accounts. Also includes work
papers used to prepare budgets.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 10 years
comments:
CAUTION: Does not include Annual
Operating Budgets; see BUD1000.
Does not include copies of
budgeting information maintained
by departments; see ALL1851.

series_title:
Reports on Performance
Measures and Supporting
Documentation
series_description:
Quarterly and annual reports on agency
performance measures submitted to
executive and legislative offices. Includes
supporting documentation.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 6 years

series_description:
Documentation of state, federal, or other
sponsored grant projects participated in or
administered by UT System. May include
grant authorization records, which provide
evidence of the award of grants to or by
agencies; awarded or non-awarded
proposals; and grant/project financial or
performance reports, which are periodic
reports of financial activity and/or
program performance related to grants
received or made by agencies.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years

series_description:
Annual and quarterly reports of all major
new construction and repair and
rehabilitation projects to be implemented
and funded from institution and System-
wide revenue sources.
retention_statement: Permanent
comments:
NOTE: Major projects are defined
in the Regents’ Rules and
Regulations as those with a total
project cost of $10,000,000 or
more. Projects that are
architecturally or historically
significant are also identified as
major projects regardless of cost.

series_description:
Project records related to planning,
design, construction, conversion, or
modernization of state facilities,
structures, infrastructure, and systems,
including feasibility, screening, and
implementation studies; topographical
and soil surveys and reports; as-builts;
laboratory test reports; environmental
impact statements; correspondence;
successful and unsuccessful bid
documentation and other related
documentation.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 11 years
After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 11 years

series_description:
Includes architectural and engineering
drawings, profiles, and blueprints of
planning, design, construction, conversion,
or modernization of state-owned facilities,
structures, infrastructure, and systems.
retention_statement: Life of Asset

series_description:
Building construction contracts, surety
bonds, and inspection records.
retention_statement: Life of Asset plus 10 years

series_description:
Requests or work orders for repairs or
maintenance to facilities, vehicles, or
equipment completed by internal agency
personnel or external service providers.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 5 years

series_description:
Records relating to the issuance of keys,
identification cards, building passes,
passwords, signed statements or similar
instruments of access to agency or state
facilities, equipment or automated
systems.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years

series_description:
Records and reports of postage expenses,
including postal meter usage.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Quotes for minor construction and repair
projects and supplies. Includes supporting
documentation, as applicable.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year

series_title:
Financial Disclosure and
Conflict of Interest
Affidavits
series_description: For the Chancellor and Presidents.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Calendars, appointment books, or other
scheduling or itinerary records maintained
by or on behalf of the Chancellor.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 1 year

series_title:
Executive Officer
Performance - Workplans
and Appraisals
series_description:
Job evaluations, performance appraisals,
or other similar documents used to
evaluate the performance of an employee.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Invoices; vouchers (encumbrance,
purchase, expenditure, or special
vouchers); statements; copies of checks
and purchase orders; expenditure
authorizations; ledgers; and similar
records that serve to document
disbursements. Includes ProCard
statements and backup documentation.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Bill copies or stubs, statements, billing
registers, account cards, deposit warrants,
cash receipts, credit card receipts, receipts
books, cash transfers, daily cash reports,
reconciliations, special vouchers, and
similar records that serve to document
money owed to or received by a state
agency and its collection or receipt.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Bank statements, credit card statements,
cancelled checks, check registers, deposit
slips, debit and credit notices,
reconciliations, and other banking related
records.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Sufficient records to verify information on
unclaimed property showing the name
and last known address of the apparent
owner of reportable unclaimed property, a
brief description of the property, and the
balance of each unclaimed account, if
appropriate. Includes both escheatment
and documentation of unclaimed property
claims made by System.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 10 years

series_description:
Records of accounts deemed
uncollectible, including write-off
authorizations and returned checks,
warrants, and drafts.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 3 years

series_description:
Includes requests for Taxpayer
Identification number (TIN) and
Certification (W-9 Forms).
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years
comments:
FE=The fiscal year in which the
account is opened or the
instrument is purchased.

series_description:
Records documenting the investment of
any public funds that evidence the
investment of such funds, the cancellation
or withdrawal of investments, and similar
activities.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 5 years

series_description:
Bids that do not meet agency submission
requirements and are not included in the
bid evaluation process (e.g. withdrawn,
missed submission deadline, incomplete
submission, etc.)
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years
comments:
CAUTION: For bids that are
included in the bid evaluation
process, whether successful or
unsuccessful, see CNP1003.

series_description:
Requests for information preliminary to
the procurement of goods or services by
direct purchase or bid.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 0 years
comments:
CAUTION: If the request for
information leads to request for
proposal or bid, see item CNP1001.

series_description:
Contract Summaries, Purchase Order
Summaries, Past Request for Proposal
Postings, and the Contract Transparency
Report.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Records documenting the inventorying,
maintenance, usage, and disposal of
supplies, equipment, and property of a
state agency. Includes property logs and
cards for lost and found property. May
also include lost, stolen, or damaged
property reports.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years
comments:
NOTE: The Controller maintains the
official record of inventory, but
department inventory contacts are
responsible for maintaining copies
of inventory information provided
by individual staff (e.g., emails or
pictures) for their respective
departments.

series_description:
Documentation relating to the capital and
fixed assets of a state agency, including
equipment or property history cards
containing data on initial cost,
depreciation schedules or summaries used
for capital outlay budgeting, and property
sale, auction, or disposal records of
agency owned equipment and property.
retention_statement: Life of Asset plus 3 years

series_description:
Payroll records and registers documenting
employee earnings, wages, and pay. This
may include but is not limited to W-4
Forms, W-5 Forms, Income Adjustment
Authorizations, Direct Deposit
Applications and Authorizations,
Employee Deduction Authorizations,
payroll input records, summary
statements, payroll vouchers, payroll
detail sheets, and payroll history.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 4 years
comments:
NOTE: Some older payroll records
may be retained by Human
Resources in the employee file.
Such payroll records are retained
until superseded or separation or
termination of employment + 5
years.

retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 9 years

series_description:
Annual Financial Report (AFR) required by
the General Appropriations Act (100 Day
Report).
retention_statement: Permanent
comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: The final report
must be submitted to the Texas
State Publications Depository
Program per 13 TAC 3.3(a)(2)(a).

series_description:
Working files and related documentation
used to prepare the AFR.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 7 years

series_description:
Includes 1099, W2, FICA, excise tax, and
other tax records.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 4 years

series_description:
Form 990-T and related tax records. Also
includes OK512E and related
documentation.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 23 years
comments: See IRS Publication 598.

series_description:
List of passengers on an aircraft. Includes
passenger manifest (snapshot of flight).
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years
comments:
Copies are sent to TxDOT Flight
Services annually.

series_description:
Logs and related documentation used to
maintain information about state-owned
aircraft flight data. Includes pilot manifest
signed by passengers.
retention_statement: Life of Asset plus 3 years
comments:
Copies are sent to TxDOT Flight
Services annually.

retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 0 years
Fiscal Year End plus 5 years

series_title:
Employee Insurance
Records (Including
Affordable Care Act and
COBRA Records)
series_description: Includes all employee insurance records.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 6 years

series_description:
Medical, Vision, Dental, Long-Term Care,
Long and Short-Term Disability, Flexible
Spending Account, Wellness
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 15 years
Until Superseded plus 10 years
comments:
Audit requirements require 10-year
retention period.

retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 1 year
Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description: Ledgers related to employee benefits.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 3 years

series_description:
Worksheets related to employee benefit
operations.
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 5 years

series_description:
Direct payment agreements for COBRA
and retirees.
retention_statement: Until Superseded
After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 2 years

series_title:
Employee Insurance and
Retirement Employee
Reference Materials
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 0 years

series_title:
Retirement Loan and
Deferred Compensation
Plan Information
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 10 years
After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 6 years

series_title:
Employee Benefits
ProCard and Expenditure
Vouchers
retention_statement: Fiscal Year End plus 7 years

series_description:
May include incapacitated dependent
applications, dependent amnesty, special
dependent applications, and ZIP Code
applications.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 5 years

series_title:
Employee Benefits
Insurance - Electronic
Medical Claims
series_description:
Electronic claims data kept on the
mainframe.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 7 years

series_title:
Life Insurance Contracts
and Retirement Contracts
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 30 years
comments:
For Employee Benefits Insurance
Contracts, see item CNP1003
(Contract Administration Files).

retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 7 years

series_title:
Employee Benefits
Security Policies,
Procedures and Program
Documentation
retention_statement: Until Superseded plus 6 years

series_description:
Personnel records of participants of the
University of Texas Government
Retirement Agreement (UTGRA) program.
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 10 years
comments:
In accordance with Article 1,
Paragraph 1.9 (b) of the UTGRA
Plan Document, OEB maintains
UTGRA records on behalf of the
Board of Regents (BOR). The BOR
therefore is the owner of the
records but delegates OEB to take
any ministerial actions necessary
on behalf of UT System for the
administration of the UTGRA plan.

series_description:
Includes active files for Endowments,
Estates, Charitable Trusts, Held-in Trust by
Others, Contingent or Revocable Gifts, and
Current Purpose Gifts.
retention_statement: Permanent
comments:
Archival code added per 13 TAC
Sec. 6.10(b), but records will
remain at UT System in perpetuity.

series_title:
Estates or Assets Held in
Trust by Others
retention_statement: After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 10 years
After Closed (or terminated, completed, expired, or settled) plus 7 years
Permanent
comments:
Archival code added per 13 TAC
Sec. 6.10(b), but records will
remain at UT System in perpetuity.

series_title:
Charitable Trusts/ Pooled
